title: Packet Exception Logger
description: A simple Fabric mod to print out packet exceptions when they occur in client logs.
body:
**A simple Fabric mod to print out packet exceptions when they occur in client logs.**

This is primarily a developer tool and is designed to help server owners debug packet issues or exceptions.

This mod also works well in conjunction with [StackDeobfuscator](https://modrinth.com/mod/stackdeobf), which can be used to deobfuscate the stacktraces generated by this mod.

## Links
- Donate: [https://patreon.com/redned](https://patreon.com/redned)
- Issues: [Open an issue](https://github.com/Redned235/packet-exception-logger/issues/new)
